title: telis corniculata
intro: Telis corniculata, also known as the Fingered Telis, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been shown to exhibit potential antimicrobial and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Telis corniculata include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Telis corniculata can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, which are often used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential side effects.
